Barra Salada Beach, located in the charming municipality of Sonsonate, is an idyllic destination for those seeking tranquility and natural beauty. With its warm and pleasant climate, this beach invites you to unwind, soak up the sun, and enjoy life’s simple pleasures. Don’t forget to pack your sunscreen, beach chairs, and towels for the ultimate comfort!Know moreBarra Salada’s expansive shoreline ensures plenty of space for everyone, allowing visitors to enjoy their activities without crowding. Whether you’re setting up a soccer match, playing beach volleyball, or trying your hand at sport fishing, this beach offers endless opportunities for fun and relaxation.The beach’s natural landscape is a feast for the eyes, with its pristine environment largely untouched by human intervention. On sunny days, the water displays moderate waves, creating a striking contrast between the intense blue sea and the white foam of the breaking waves. location_text: BARRA SALADA BEACH FRONT LOTFor Sale·Barra Salada, Sonsonate, El SalvadorShareView all photos$ 450,000 NegotiableAvailable todayNo data·No data·2690.79 sqftView all photos$ 450,000 NegotiableAvailable todayListed on Feb 24, 20252690.79m2Ocean frontProperty TypeNo year dataOwned sinceBarra Salada Beach: A Hidden Gem in Western El SalvadorLooking for the perfect spot for a picnic or a relaxing day under the sun? On sunny days, the water displays moderate waves, creating a striking contrast between the intense blue sea and the white foam of the breaking waves. The grayish, wet sand and the presence of stunning estuaries add to its unique charm.Barra Salada is also a fantastic destination for families. Its clean, quiet, and safe environment makes it an excellent choice for a peaceful getaway. The locals take great pride in maintaining the beach’s cleanliness, ensuring a pleasant experience for all visitors.For those seeking adventure, the beach’s vast expanse is perfect for beach sports like volleyball or simply lounging under the sun. Sport fishing enthusiasts will also find Barra Salada to be an ideal spot.While the beach is popular among tourists, it remains relatively uncrowded, offering a sense of exclusivity. Many visitors choose to stay in the nearby ranches or resorts that dot the coastline, adding to the beach’s tranquil vibe.Barra Salada Beach is more than just a destination—it’s an experience. title: COSTA AZUL BEACH LOT
description: COSTA AZUL BEACH LOTFor Sale·Playa Costa Azul, Sonsonate, El SalvadorShareView all photos$399,000  NegotiableAvailable todayNo data·No data·1604.22  sqftView all photos$399,000  NegotiableAvailable todayListed on Feb 24, 20251604.22 m2Ocean frontProperty TypeNo year dataOwned sinceCosta Azul Beach: A Tropical Paradise in El SalvadorWhen it comes to breathtaking beaches, El Salvador is a hidden gem, and Costa Azul Beach is one of its most enchanting treasures. Located in the municipality of Acajutla, in the Sonsonate district, this expansive tropical paradise offers the perfect escape to enjoy the sun, sand, and the refreshing sea in all its splendor.Know moreJust an hour from the country’s capital, Costa Azul Beach is the ideal destination for a memorable day trip or a unique weekend getaway. Visitors often describe it as a slice of Eden, thanks to its stunning natural landscapes that are nothing short of a visual masterpiece. The warm, calm waters, especially during summer, invite you to relax and unwind.Surrounded by charming reefs, Costa Azul Beach is a haven for water sports enthusiasts. Whether you’re into snorkeling, diving, or simply exploring the vibrant marine life, this beach has it all. Its proximity to San Salvador ensures easy access to various amenities and services, making it a favorite among locals and tourists.For photography lovers, Costa Azul Beach is a dream come true. Every corner of this expansive shoreline is filled with picturesque details, from the go
location_text: COSTA AZUL BEACH LOTFor Sale·Playa Costa Azul, Sonsonate, El SalvadorShareView all photos$399,000  NegotiableAvailable todayNo data·No data·1604.22  sqftView all photos$399,000  NegotiableAvailable todayListed on Feb 24, 20251604.22 m2Ocean frontProperty TypeNo year dataOwned sinceCosta Azul Beach: A Tropical Paradise in El SalvadorWhen it comes to breathtaking beaches, El Salvador is a hidden gem, and Costa Azul Beach is one of its most enchanting treasures. Located in the municipality of Acajutla, in the Sonsonate district, this expansive tropical paradise offers the perfect escape to enjoy the sun, sand, and the refreshing sea in all its splendor.Know moreJust an hour from the country’s capital, Costa Azul Beach is the ideal destination for a memorable day trip or a unique weekend getaway. Visitors often describe it as a slice of Eden, thanks to its stunning natural landscapes that are nothing short of a visual masterpiece. The warm, calm waters, especially during summer, invite you to relax and unwind.Surrounded by charming reefs, Costa Azul Beach is a haven for water sports enthusiasts. Whether you’re into snorkeling, diving, or simply exploring the vibrant marine life, this beach has it all. Its proximity to San Salvador ensures easy access to various amenities and services, making it a favorite among locals and tourists.For photography lovers, Costa Azul Beach is a dream come true. Every corner of this expansive shoreline is filled with picturesque details, from the golden sands to the crystal-clear waters and the captivating reefs. It’s the perfect backdrop for capturing unforgettable moments.During the summer months, guided diving tours are available, offering a chance to explore the rich marine biodiversity that thrives in the surrounding waters. Time seems to stand still as you encounter a variety of colorful marine species.On land, the beach’s vast stretches of sand are perfect for sunbathing, beach games, and sports, making it a delightful destination for adults and children. Whether you’re seeking adventure or relaxation, Costa Azul Beach has something for everyone.Undoubtedly, Costa Azul Beach is an exceptional destination for a family vacation. raw_price_text: COSTA AZUL BEACH LOTFor Sale·Playa Costa Azul, Sonsonate, El SalvadorShareView all photos$399,000  NegotiableAvailable todayNo data·No data·1604.22  sqftView all photos$399,000  NegotiableAvailable todayListed on Feb 24, 20251604.22 m2Ocean frontProperty TypeNo year dataOwned sinceCosta Azul Beach: A Tropical Paradise in El SalvadorWhen it comes to breathtaking beaches, El Salvador is a hidden gem, and Costa Azul Beach is one of its most enchanting treasures. Located in the municipality of Acajutla, in the Sonsonate district, this expansive tropical paradise offers the perfect escape to enjoy the sun, sand, and the refreshing sea in all its splendor.Know moreJust an hour from the country’s capital, Costa Azul Beach is the ideal destination for a memorable day trip or a unique weekend getaway. Visitors often describe it as a slice of Eden, thanks to its stunning natural landscapes that are nothing short of a visual masterpiece. The warm, calm waters, especially during summer, invite you to relax and unwind.Surrounded by charming reefs, Costa Azul Beach is a haven for water sports enthusiasts. Whether you’re into snorkeling, diving, or simply exploring the vibrant marine life, this beach has it all. Its proximity to San Salvador ensures easy access to various amenities and services, making it a favorite among locals and tourists.For photography lovers, Costa Azul Beach is a dream come true. Every corner of this expansive shoreline is filled with picturesque details, from the golden sands to the crystal-clear waters and the captivating reefs. It’s the perfect backdrop for capturing unforgettable moments.During the summer months, guided diving tours are available, offering a chance to explore the rich marine biodiversity that thrives in the surrounding waters. Time seems to stand still as you encounter a variety of colorful marine species.On land, the beach’s vast stretches of sand are perfect for sunbathing, beach games, and sports, making it a delightful destination for adults and children. Whether you’re seeking adventure or relaxation, Costa Azul Beach has something for everyone.Undoubtedly, Costa Azul Beach is an exceptional destination for a family vacation. This natural jewel of El Salvador offers the perfect blend of pristine landscapes and serene beauty, allowing you to reconnect with nature and create lasting memories.Discover the magic of Costa Azul Beach—a place where the sea, sand, and sun come together to create an unforgettable experience.Contact us today to schedule a showing and take the first step toward owning your own piece of paradise.Features100 meters from the famous river mouth of Costa Azul1hr30 minutes driving distance from El Zonte beach1hr40 minutes from El Tunco Town1 hr drive from San Salvador*Note: -This showing may apply a feeListing updated: May 13, 2025Total Views: 1.914RelacionadoMore Ocean front Homes For SaleBARRA SALADA BEACH FRONT LOTBarra Salada, Sonsonate, El Salvador--bed·--bath·2690.79m2$ 450,000 NegotiableRelacionadoLA VENTANA BEACH FRONT LOTLa Ventana beach, Surfcity 2, Usulutan, El Salvador--bed·--bath·1452.69m2$-RelacionadoNearby homes for sale inEl Salvador,SonsonateCERROMAR stage 3 lot #3Cerromar, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·--m2$196,742RelacionadoCERROMAR stage 3 lot #2Cerromar, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·--m2$246,603RelacionadoCERROMAR stage 3 lot #1Cerromar, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·--m2$224,000RelacionadoAtami Lot steps from the Palmarcito BeachAtami, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·597m2$121,500RelacionadoSol Y Mar Ocean-view LotSol y Mar, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·609.96m2$220,000RelacionadoOcean-view property in El MajahualPlaya Majahual, La Libertad, El Salvador--bed·--bath·1,397.85m2$299,000Relacionado$399,000  NegotiableGet pre-qualifiedNo data·No data·1604.22  sqftView all photosRelacionado

title: Cliffside apartments in El Zonte
description: Unique opportunity in El Zonte, amazing apartments complex, just 5 minutes away from K59 and downtown El Zonte, ocean front location with breathtaking ocean view, perfect for vacation home or investment opportunity.
location_text: El Zonte Beach, 5 minutes away from El Zonte downtown and K59

title: Las Luces Gated Community (Lots Available in the 6th Phase)
description: Residencial Las Luces is perfect for those who are looking to live in a middle ground between the urban side of La Libertad and the coastal side. Las Luces is one of the finest residential areas in La Libertad, situated approximately 10 minutes away from El Tunco beach. It boasts amenities such as parks, tennis courts, gyms, nature trails, and a clubhouse with an event hall. This is the ideal place to build the house of your dreams.
location_text: Las Luces, La Libertad road, Km 21, Zaragoza, La Libertad

title: Land in El Zonte (Bitcoin Beach)
description: Vacant lot in El Zonte, also known as Bitcoin Beach, a highly-popular, but still charming, tourist destination for foreign travelers. This lot is just minutes walking from town and world-class waves. This is your opportunity to invest in Bitcoin Beach.
location_text: El Zonte, Tamanique, La Libertad, El Salvador

title: Investment Opportunity: Second-line Lot in El Zonte, Bitcoin Beach
description: Second-line lot in El Zonte, AKA Bitcoin Beach, with huge investment potential. This land is strategically located in the center of up & coming developments and offers a variety of options for commercial or residential projects. El Zonte is a highly trafficked tourist destination with access to world-class waves. This property is located 45 minutes away from San Salvador and 10 minutes away from El Tunco Beach.

title: 3-Bedroom Beach House in Mirador, Surf City 1, $430,000
description: House for sale in El Mirador Gated Community, La Libertad. This gated community in Surf City 1 is ideal for those seeking to live in a residential area near the beach. Featuring ocean views, security 24/7 and proximity to the coast, this property has big potential for investment purposes such as Airbnb, long term rentals or your dream home. El Mirador Gated Community is 20 minutes away from San Salvador and 5 Minutes away from El Tunco Beach.
location_text: Complejo El Mirador, Conchalío, La Libertad.

title: 1014.41 m2 of Land in Mizata, $195,000
description: New opportunity in the growing area of Mizata — less than a 5-minute walk to the beach and surf. The perfect location for an Airbnb and/or vacation house, in close proximity to popular hotel and dining establishments like NAWi Beach House and Casaola Mizata.The urbanized surroundings ensure accessibility to essential utilities such as water, electricity, and internet. Mizata is still in the beginning phases of development, but continues to grow in popularity — one of the best up-and-coming areas to invest. Mizata is about 40 minutes from El Zonte, 1 hour and 40 minutes from San Salvador and the Internatinal Airport.

title: Land in Complejo El Mirador, Surf City 1
description: Vacant lot in Complejo El Mirador, a popular gated community with incredible ocean views, located in Surf City 1. The location is ideal for easy access to San Salvador, just a 20-30 minute drive away, as well as easy access to the beach and local surf breaks. A remarkable opportunity whether for investment purposes like AirBnB or for your dream vacation home. There is a lot of development in this particular area.
location_text: Complejo El Mirador, Conchalío, La Libertad, El Salvador

title: House / Land at Ilopango Lake
description: Incredible property located at Ilopango lake, big land and house ready for your vacation home or future hotel opportunity, more than 100 meters of front lake property. Ilopango is the second-largest lake in El Salvador, and it is just 30 minutes away from San Salvador city. In the lake you can practice a wide variety of water sports, like kayaking, jet skiing and boating. The lake’s shoreline offers restaurants with spectacular views like the Panoramic view, which has a variety of gastronomic options.
location_text: Ilopango Lake, San Salvador, El Salvador.

title: 3 Villas Complex in Costa del Sol, $1,200,000
description: Located inCosta del Sol, La Paz, just 25 minutes from El Salvador International Airport, this property sits near the scenicJaltepeque Estuary, known for its marinas, boating, and fishing activities. The complex featuresthree brand-new homes, each fully furnished, equipped, and only a 2-minute walk from the beach. Every unit offers a modern design, spacious interiors, and all the comforts ideal for both vacation living and investment.Currently managed as independentAirbnb rentals, the homes generate impressive returns—each earning up to$6,000 per monthduring high season, with a combined potential of$18,000 monthly. Its prime location, natural surroundings, and proven business model make this a standoutturnkey investmentin one of El Salvador’s most desirable coastal destinations.
location_text: Costa del Sol, La Paz, El Salvador

title: Vacant lot in Santa Ana, $450,000
description: Vacant lot situated in Barrio San Antonio, Santa Ana. This urban area provides easy access to all essential services, making it a perfect location to build your dream home or investment property. Experience the convenience of living in a well-connected neighborhood within the vibrant city of Santa Ana.
